data.body: Investigation complete. Root cause: sprint SKILL.md line 945 contains 'proceed to commit' which directly contradicts REVIEW-WORKFLOW.md line 617 'DO NOT commit with a failing review'. Agent latches onto the permissive SKILL.md clause (positional bias #11) as authorization to exit the review loop. Fix: replace 'report to user and proceed to commit' with 'escalate to the user — do NOT commit or shut down'.
